listeners.purpose: Verifies no orphan inbound refs remain before the tenant cascade drops the events. See hooks.json — same class is also registered as a tenancy hook (whichever runs first wins the idempotency check).
Soft-deletes event_facilities rows referencing the retired facility. Notifies affected event admins.

When a facility adds a blackout window, scan active event_facilities rows referencing that facility + check whether the event's [starts_at, ends_at] overlaps the blackout. When overlap detected, emit a warning via activity log + notify the event admin (opt-in) so they can reschedule or reassign facility.

Finds active events scoped to the closing branch (branch_id + implicitly via facilities). Writes an audit warning + notifies the event admin. Does NOT auto-cancel — the tenant decides whether to reschedule or relocate.

When a season is archived, scan events with season_id pointing at it that are still in pre-completed states. Emit a warning — the event should either be re-scoped to another season or completed/cancelled. Does not auto-detach the season.

When a tenant downgrades + loses event_public_visibility / event_livestream / event_prize_pool / event_multi_facility / event_sponsors, scan existing events that use the now-lost feature + surface the drift in the tenant admin UI. Does NOT auto-strip the feature (would corrupt data).
Fires when ReconcileEventFacilityBookingsJob completes. Caches the timestamp in `evt:reconciler_last_run` for the health probe + ops dashboard.
